title: Implement Historical Tick Editing
description: Implement the logic to handle edits to historical ticks. This includes providing a warning about overwriting future states and, upon confirmation, recalculating the state inheritance for all subsequent ticks.
ai_instructions: This is complex. The API might need two stages: a 'dry-run' endpoint that shows the user what changes will be cascaded, and a 'confirm' endpoint that executes the change. The recalculation logic must be robust.
execution_steps: Add tests to 'tests/timeline.test.ts' for historical edits.
Test the warning/dry-run mechanism and the confirmation/execution flow.
Test that subsequent ticks are correctly updated after a historical change is confirmed.
Run tests to see them fail.
Add the corresponding handlers to 'src/controllers/TimelineController.ts' (e.g., 'PUT /ticks/:id' or a more complex two-stage process).
Implement the recalculation and cascade logic.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-015' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: Attempting to edit a historical tick provides a warning and impact summary.
Confirming the edit correctly recalculates and overwrites all subsequent tick states.
Cancelling the edit aborts the operation with no side effects.
All tests for the historical editing feature pass.
